# GitHub Configuration

This directory contains the GitHub-specific configuration for the ZoneBridge Platform repository.

## Purpose

The configuration in this directory standardizes collaboration, code review, issue reporting, and continuous integration across the project.

Repository governance is treated as part of the engineering platform.

## Directory Structure

```text
.github/

CODEOWNERS

PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md

ISSUE_TEMPLATE/

workflows/
```

## Responsibilities

- Define repository ownership.
- Standardize pull requests.
- Standardize issue reporting.
- Configure automated workflows.
- Improve contributor experience.
